Wilcom embroidery test report

W-001
Comment

With background removal enabled, Wilcom probably misread the green as the background and removed it. Test to run: preprocess the image by removing the background before sending it to Wilcom, or set removeBackground to false and compare the results.

Request XML 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xml>
  <bitmap file="source.png" remove_background="true" />
  <autodigitize_options width="90" height="45">
    <threads>
      <thread color="4624896" code="1" brand="Embroidery Lab" description="#009246" />
      <thread color="3615694" code="2" brand="Embroidery Lab" description="#CE2B37" />
      <thread color="16777215" code="3" brand="Embroidery Lab" description="#FFFFFF" />
    </threads>
  </autodigitize_options>
  <output trueview_file="trueview.png" dpi="160" />
  <files>
    <file filename="source.png" filecontents="[omitted]" />
  </files>
</xml>
Response XML 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xml xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <design_info machine_name="Tajima" num_stitches="2843" num_colours="2" num_trims="2" num_objects="2" num_colour_changes="1" height="45.3777777777778" width="45.0166666666667" num_appliques="0" num_sequins="0" num_blings="0" num_beads="0" hoop_name="No hoop selected" comments="" title="" author="" subject="" keywords="" design_grade="Native design" design_status="" order="" order_date="0" order_due="0" order_notes="" customer="" contact="" reference="" sale_rep="" product_type="" position="" quantity="" product="" product_colors="" product_color_size_qty="" emb_version="28.0">
    <colorways>
      <colorway name="Colorway 1" bkg_color="14540253" current="true">
        <threads>
          <thread color="4624896" code="1" brand="Embroidery Lab" description="#009246" />
          <thread color="16777215" code="3" brand="Embroidery Lab" description="#FFFFFF" />
          <thread color="3615694" code="2" brand="Embroidery Lab" description="#CE2B37" />
        </threads>
      </colorway>
    </colorways>
    <stop_sequence>
      <stop_record color_idx="1" num_stitches="1433" element="" />
      <stop_record color_idx="2" num_stitches="1408" element="" />
    </stop_sequence>
    <lettering_objects />
    <monogram_objects />
  </design_info>
  <files>
    <file filename="trueview.png" filecontents="[omitted]" filecontentmode="base64encoding" />
  </files>
</xml>
W-002
Comment

Good result.

Request XML 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xml>
  <bitmap file="source.png" remove_background="true" />
  <autodigitize_options width="90" height="45"></autodigitize_options>
  <output trueview_file="trueview.png" dpi="160" />
  <files>
    <file filename="source.png" filecontents="[omitted]" />
  </files>
</xml>

W-003
Comment

Needs evaluation to see whether it can be improved; try preprocessing.

Request XML 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xml>
  <bitmap file="source.png" remove_background="true" />
  <autodigitize_options width="90" height="45">
    <threads>
      <thread color="328707" code="1" brand="Embroidery Lab" description="#030405" />
      <thread color="9057764" code="2" brand="Embroidery Lab" description="#E4358A" />

  </autodigitize_options>
  <output trueview_file="trueview.png" dpi="160" />
  <files>
    <file filename="source.png" filecontents="[omitted]" />

</xml>

W-004
Comment

Very poor result, but the image resolution after background removal may be low. Try preprocessing before sending it to Wilcom.

Request XML 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xml>
  <bitmap file="source.png" remove_background="true" />
  <autodigitize_options width="90" height="45"></autodigitize_options>
  <output trueview_file="trueview.png" dpi="160" />
  <files>
    <file filename="source.png" filecontents="[omitted]" />
  </files>
</xml>

W-006
Comment

The source image is too detailed, but try fine-tuning the API parameters to see whether it can be improved.

Request XML 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xml>
  <bitmap file="source.png" remove_background="true" />
  <autodigitize_options width="90" height="45"></autodigitize_options>
  <output trueview_file="trueview.png" dpi="160" />
  <files>
    <file filename="source.png" filecontents="[omitted]" />
  </files>
</xml>

W-007
Comment

Result has defects. Need to understand whether the source image has issues and whether we can detect them before sending the request to Wilcom.

Request XML 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xml>
  <bitmap file="source.png" remove_background="true" />
  <autodigitize_options width="90" height="45"></autodigitize_options>
  <output trueview_file="trueview.png" dpi="160" />
  <files>
    <file filename="source.png" filecontents="[omitted]" />
  </files>
</xml>

W-009
Comment

Unsatisfactory result: the background was removed, but not completely. Test again without background removal.

Request XML 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xml>
  <bitmap file="source.png" remove_background="true" />
  <autodigitize_options width="90" height="45"></autodigitize_options>
  <output trueview_file="trueview.png" dpi="160" />

W-016
Comment

Although the request includes five colors, Wilcom uses only one. Test other gradients.
